title: Next.js Routing
author: Shrajesh
content:
Next.js provides file-system based routing.

### Benefits
- Code splitting
- Server-side rendering
- Easy dynamic routes

title: Ai model
author: shrejesh sthaa
content: OpenAI's latest AI model, GPT-5.5, is designed to support "real work" and includes improvements for coding, research, and general productivity tasks. It is built to understand complex goals, use tools, check its work, and carry more tasks through to completion. GPT-5.5 is stronger at turning messy, multi-step requests into finished work and is particularly effective in agentic coding, real-world GitHub issue resolution, and long-horizon coding tasks.
